See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 3212 => 'Tongern', 3215 => 'Mecheln', 3216 => 'Löwen', 322 => 'Brüssel', 323 => 'Antwerpen', 3242 => 'Lüttich', 3243 => 'Lüttich', 3250 => 'Brügge', 3257 => 'Ypern', 3259 => 'Ostende', 3263 => 'Arel', 3265 => 'Bergen', 3280 => 'Stablo', 3281 => 'Namür', 329 => 'Gent', ];
